testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Expected title: Products but got: Swag Labs expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected title: Products but got: Swag Labs expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.thePageTitleShouldBe(LoginSteps.java:42) at ✽.the page title should be "Products"(file:///C:/Users/aruns/eclipse-workspace/ejada-automation-framework/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:18)
